name: Cantor Equity Partners IV, Inc.
business: Cantor Equity Partners IV, Inc. is a blank check company formed to effect a business combination, focusing its search on companies in financial services, digital assets, healthcare, real estate services, technology, and software industries. It has no current operations or revenues.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until August 22, 2027 (24 months from the closing of the Initial Public Offering), or until such earlier liquidation date as the Board may approve or such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Memorandum and Articles, to consummate the Business Combination.
